rationale: In the citing paper, Batra et al. (2017) appears as one item in a grouped citation in the General Discussion to illustrate that cross-cultural variability can affect consumer outcomes (e.g., brand evaluations). The citation is not used in hypothesis development, mechanism specification, measurement, or empirical design of the mass customization interface studies. Because the paper does not assign a distinct functional role to this specific source beyond broad background positioning, this is a passing mention.
